careers.title: Ayyuka a DeHub
careers.subtitle: Ka shiga ƙungiyar da ke gina makomar kafofin watsa labarai na zamani
careers.intro: Muna neman mutane masu ƙwazo waɗanda suke son zama ɓangare na sabon zagayen kafofin watsa labarai. Duk muƙamai suna aiki daga nesa gaba ɗaya tare da lokutan aiki masu sassauci.
careers.bdmAbout: A matsayin Manajan Bunƙasa Kasuwanci a DeHub za ka zama ƙarfin da ke motsa dabarun haɗin gwiwar mu.
careers.bdmResp1: Gano da tabbatar da haɗin gwiwa na dabaru tare da kamfanonin Web2 da Web3
careers.bdmResp2: Gina da sarrafa jerin abokan hulɗa da za a iya samu
careers.bdmResp4: Tattauna sharuɗɗan haɗin gwiwa da samfuran rabon kuɗi
careers.bdmResp5: Haɗin kai tare da ƙungiyoyin samfuri da tallata
careers.bdmReq1: Gogewa tabbatacciya a bunƙasa kasuwanci ko tallace-tallace a fasaha ko Web3
careers.bdmReq2: Ƙarfin hanyar sadarwa a sararin crypto/Web3 babbar fa'ida ce
careers.bdmReq4: Mai ƙarfafa kai kuma mai daɗin aiki na kai
careers.bdmReq5: Sha'awar gaske game da kafofin watsa labarai na zamani ko blockchain
careers.bdmComp: Wannan muƙami yana ba da albashin tushe mai tattaunawa tare da tsarin kwamiti OTE marar iyaka.
careers.ambassadorAbout: A matsayin Jakadan Alama na DeHub kai ne fuskar da muryar dandamali a cikin al'ummar ka.
careers.ambassadorResp1: Ƙirƙira da raba abun ciki na gaskiya game da DeHub
careers.ambassadorResp2: Shiga cikin al'ummar DeHub a cikin app
careers.ambassadorResp4: Kawo sabbin masu amfani zuwa dandamali ta hanyar hanyar sadarwar ka
careers.ambassadorReq2: Sha'awar Web3, crypto ko al'adun masu ƙirƙira
careers.ambassadorReq4: Mai ƙarfafa kai, iya tsara yaƙin neman zaɓe da kansa
careers.ambassadorReq5: Gogewa ta baya a matsayin jakada fa'ida ce
careers.ambassadorComp: Jakadoji suna karɓar albashin wata mai tattaunawa.
careers.footerText: Ba ka ga muƙami da ya dace ba? Tuntube mu a
